title: APEX Agent Registry
description: Shape of tools/registry/agent-registry.json. Maps agent role keys to {agent path, model, step, invokable}. Skills are wired by the agent body's `Read .github/skills/{name}/...` line (discovered at runtime via the orphan-content validator regex), not by an entry in this registry.

agents.description: Map of agent role keys to agent entries.

subagents.description: Map of subagent role keys to agent entries.

model.description: Model name. Must equal the `model` field in the agent's YAML frontmatter (validated by validate-model-consistency.mjs). Catalog entry is documentation only and is not enforced.

invokable.description: Whether the agent can be directly invoked by users.

step.description: Workflow step number (null for orchestrators and cross-cutting agents).

skillName.description: Reserved for future use (currently unreferenced after skill arrays were removed). Skill names are kebab-case and must match a directory under .github/skills/.
